DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION IS GRANTED AS IT SEEKS TERMINATING SANCTIONS. DEFENDANT ZHONGDA GROUP (USA) INC.'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH PREVIOUS ORDERS WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. THE COURT FINDS THAT ADDITIONAL ORDERS TO PARTICIPATE IN THE DISCOVERY PROCESS WOULD NOT RESULT IN COMPLIANCE. DEFENDANT ZHONGDA GROUP (USA) INC.'S ANSWER IS ORDERED STRICKEN AND ITS DEFAULT SHALL BE ENTERED. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias, CSR: Trina Ayala.
Martin Zarata, Esq., for Plaintiff: Kenny Chen dba Autobahn Collision Repair Specialists was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Zhongda Group, (USA) Inc., and Defendant Peter Grillas, as follows:
Principal $524,000.00
Costs $1,729.95 for a total of $525,729.95.
Judgment signed in open court
